title: the weirdest bosses ever
description:
This an extremely weird mod which adds weird stuff and even a weird dimension

you need 12 beacons to go there lol
body:
The mod adds 4 main bosses, a new dimension and bunch of items (all weird)
To enter the weird dimension, You need beacons in a nether portal shape and craft an igniter by putting 1 diamond ore in crafting
More details in this:
[the showcase](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Le-YtZ71ing)
Second update for minecraft's greatest player, Happy 25th Techno
[this is the update showcase](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3ZdZQgPnFZw)
the third update moves it to neoforge, and adds an end expansion
